elena.request_summary: Deliver a small test to ensure 'pygame' package installation in the project.
elena.why: The README.md file lacks instructions on installing 'pygame', which could lead to errors when running tests or executing the main.py script.
top_steps: Identify location for new test in 'tests'
Add pytest test case for 'pygame' package installation in 'main.py'
Write simple test checking if 'pygame' module is imported
success_criteria: 'test_main.py' should contain at least one test to verify pygame installation
Test should pass without raising an ImportError for the 'pygame' module
